name: Giving step-grandma the wrong pills(on purpose)
description:
Your step-grandma has trouble sleeping, so she usually sends you to buy her some sleeping pills, its the only thing that helps her to sleep, you went to the drug store and saw the aphrodisiac pills right next to the sleeping pills, so you had an idea, your grandma is always showing off her huge curves, and you decided you will have some of that one way or another, so you took the label of sleeping pills and changed them to aphrodisiac pills, and bought the aphrodisiac pills.

Also if you wonder why i put the on purpose part in the tittle is because I have a version where you give the wrong pills accidentally.

I dont know who made the profile picture of this bot, so no credits this time
